reviews.review_description: I always  wanted to meet opportunity  because  I am sad for opportunity  being covered in sand on Mars
The shortest planet Mars experience I ever had.  Don't waste your time.
Super cool experience, I really recommend a trip to Mars!

reviews.review_title: This is not a game or an adventure.
reviews.review_description:
It is an absolutely gorgeous experience made specifically to show multiple people VR for the first time.

It's designed to set a person up, then let them go through the experience in 3 to 5 minutes.  After which they hand it off to the next person with no additional setup or explanation. No one has to know anything about operating VR to be blown away by this quick and impactful example of what VR can achieve. 

This was worth the cup of coffee it cost me just for my own amazement. 

And any person who wants to make a quick point to people that have no interest in learning about VR should have this app. It's perfect for when you take your headset to a family event and everyone wants to try it. And because it's so short and specific, it quickly encourages sharing and turn taking. Unlike a game that someone may choose to keep playing while others are patiently waiting.

I hope this team makes more of these. Maybe something for people who can only sit?

I opened the game, followed the little instructions it had, and got down to the surface of the planet to restart the Rover, then it had me go back up in the craft and that was the end.  It started all over again.  Where and how do we set up this adventure for our friends?  It looks cool, works well but... what's next?

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your feedback! We are sorry our experience did not live up to your expectations. We try and state that this experience is for groups of people (friends, family, and colleagues?), as an introduction of what VR has to offer. For this to be possible, the experience must be mind-bending but fairly short, and at the same time be interesting for those who already have done the experience and those waiting to do it. Please let family and friends try it and watch their reactions (also the reactions of those who spectate) and get back to us. That said, we would like to expand this experience, and you buying this product supports in doing so, so for that we thank you!

reviews.review_description: The experience is unreal, I felt like I was on another world because of all the sounds and effects. I never knew walking in a VR game could be so epic. I have never seen anything else like it in VR. Really cool experience!
